name: Rossum API
description:
The Rossum API allows for programmatic access to manage your organization's
data and account information.

We do our best to keep things accurate and complete. If you find any inaccuracies
or gaps in this guide, please reach out to [support@rossum.ai](mailto:support@rossum.ai).
